title: Collection 8 Piece Gold Measuring Cups Set and Measuring Spoons, Golden With fragrant wood Handles-Complete Set of Measure Cups and Spoons For Cooking and Baking.…
description:
About this item
【Special Plating material】Our golden stainless steel measuring cups and spoons make of high quality Stainless steel and using the latest coloring process. No toxic ingredients, NO fade, Suitable for many occasions like banquet, kitchen.
【Premium wood scented handle】Our golden measuring spoons with a high quality wooden handle, sturdy, non-slip wood handle carefully ground to ensure no small wood thorn. With a natural wood aroma, it makes you feel like you are in nature.
【Various size】 four different sizes measuring cups：1 cup, 1/2 cup , 1/3 cup, 1/4 cup, 1/8 cup. Four Measuring Spoons:. 1Tbsp, 1Tsp, 1/2 Tsp, 1/4Tsp. The various size can meet all your usage needs.
【Elegant golden】Elegant golden measuring cups and spoons Suitable for many occasions like restaurant, home kitchen, dinner party. The This golden measuring spoon is also great for photos and as a gift.
【Quality Service】We have a complete after-sales guarantee, If the If the product has quality problems, please contact us as soon as possible, we will replacement for you or refund for you immediately.
reviews_5s:
This set is so pretty, easy to clean, use, and store. Ingredients don’t stick to the inside, flour falls right out, no residue.Play Video
Beautiful gold finish, very warm toned with the wooden handles, looks awesome if you hang it in the kitchen like I do. This is hand-wash only but no big deal, also they could come with more little golden chains to hang them but I improvised and used zip ties. The writing on mine is very well carved and easy to read.I bought these to upgrade from plastic. They look nice, work great and are easy to clean. Hand wash and air dry and they’ll last forever.Super cute and sturdy. With any wood kitchen tools be mindful of leaving them submerged/ left in dishwasher for too long to avoid mold. I like to run them through the dishwasher and then air dry themThese very attractive measuring cups were a gift for an elderly woman who attends the same early morning church service as I do. Nearly every Sunday she brings in the most delicious bakery (sometimes so fresh, it's warm!) --cupcakes, caramel rolls, coffee cake, etc. They are amazing. I wasn't sure how to thank her properly, so purchased these for her as a thank-you gift. She liked them very much.I love the color and materials used, however, after just 4.5 months, it is hard to read the measurements. I'll have to use my engraver to freshen them up a bit, and I wish that they were individually roped, but that's a project I can handle on my own. They are stylish and serve their purpose.I haven't used them yet, so, I am only able to comment on the look. But they feel very sturdy and weighty.GreatThese measuring set is gorgeous! Can't believe the price for the quality and aesthetic. If you are looking for new measuring cups for your kitchen - you have found them. I honestly think these would be a great Christmas present too! (I mean, I would be extremely happy to get these as a gift lol)These are absolutely beautiful, sturdy and great quality. Completely happy with my purchase
reviews_1s:
Loved the look new. Arrived flawless. I’m a busy mom, I don’t bake more than once a month at most. After an estimated 6 uses and 6 hand washes these have completely fallen apart. The stain on the handles is gone on the ones that I have used. The copper is scratching and discolored and won’t clean up even after using a copper treatment on them. Bought these in March and it’s September.These measuring cups are very bulky and clunky. They don't nest inside one another very well, so they take up a ton of space. The handles are so chunky too, making them less than ideal. They definitely weren't for me, so I returned them immediately.This is the second time I have ordered these measuring cups and they have broke.Item was a gift, broke almost immediately. And Amazon wouldn’t allow a return. Really disappointed in the item and Amazon Customer Service in general.i loved these measuring cups but unfortunately after having them for a few months and using/handwashing them regularly, the color rubbed off to reveal an ugly silver-ish color underneath. i loved these and how sturdy they a
were and the color was beautiful until it rubbed off.No good . First wash and all the copper color washed off . seems like they were spray painted . Would never buy againThe chain that holds them together was brokenSpoons arrived damaged and rusted.I received 2 1/3cups and no 1/4cupGot multiple 1/4 cups, no 1/3 cup and all the spoons were chipped and damaged. Don’t waste your money, now I have to go out of my own way to print a label and go find a UPS to return it because I was given no other alternative solution.
